posts.author: AkshAshish
posts.text: Hello everyone, Prime Focus is looking very interesting to me right now. The production costs for Ramayana should drop off substantially after Q3, which means that even if the movie only does “okay” at the box office, we could still see their margins start to expand. Alongside that, the new developments rolling out of Brahma AI look highly promising. Does anyone here have an update on their NCLAT case? The main hearing was scheduled for today (July 9). I know they already deposited the required funds to stay the insolvency proceedings, so it seems like the only real hurdle the company has left…
